property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Enter the objectApi name (dynamic value {!objectApiName} not working on ExpCloud, enter the value ex.: Vehicle)

property.name: powerMeasureName
property.label: Enter the Asset Telematics Measure Name to display in the chart at bottom left of the component (default is Power)

property.name: doorsMeasureName
property.label: Enter the Asset Telematics Measure Name to associate to the lock state in the control panel (default is Doors)

property.name: chargeMeasureName
property.label: Enter the Asset Telematics Measure Name to associate to the battery charge (default is Charge)

property.name: powerMeasureName
property.label: Enter the Asset Telematics Measure Name to display in the chart at bottom left of the component (default is Power)

property.name: doorsMeasureName
property.label: Enter the Asset Telematics Measure Name to associate to the lock state in the control panel (default is Doors)

property.name: chargeMeasureName
property.label: Enter the Asset Telematics Measure Name to associate to the battery charge (default is Charge)
